name: Wide Establishing Shot
description: Epic landscape establishing shot — environment quality and cinematic scale matter most.

shot.description: Aerial view of a fog-covered mountain valley at dawn. A small village sits in the distance.
shot.prompt: Aerial establishing shot of a misty mountain valley at sunrise, small village in the distance, volumetric fog, golden hour lighting, epic cinematic scale, photorealistic landscape

notes: No characters — environment quality is key. Should favor providers with photorealism and camera control.
